judgment.summary: A financial institution with strong revenue growth and a low forward P/E, but facing headwinds in earnings growth and returns.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by 3.3%; next earnings date is 2026-07-21.
positives: Forward P/E of 7.75x is very attractive relative to earnings expectations.
Revenue growth of 46.3% YoY indicates strong top-line expansion.
Quarterly earnings growth of 54.8% shows recent positive momentum.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a high mean target price of $255.19.
Board approved quarterly dividend with a 1.7% yield.
negatives: Earnings growth YoY is negative at -3.2%, despite revenue growth.
Profit margin of 8.9% and Return on Equity of 3.3% are modest.
Last quarter's EPS missed estimates by 3.3%.
Analyst estimates for current Q and FY show very low growth.
Gross margin is 0.0%, which is unusual for a financial institution.

news.paragraph: Capital One Financial Corporation (COF) recently saw its board approve a quarterly dividend amidst reported top-line growth, a positive signal for income-focused investors. Analyst sentiment remains largely bullish, with a consensus 'buy' rating and a mean target price suggesting significant upside potential. The upcoming earnings report on July 21st will be a key catalyst to watch for confirmation of growth trends.
